prompt:
Requested test types: Functional / E2E, UI Testing
User flow (design source of truth ‚Äî 2 screens). Each screen has a design image (attached, model can see it); the LIVE app is validated AGAINST each screen's design as you navigate. NONE of these images is the live app.
  1. Screen "Home" ‚Äî reached by: Start page ‚Äî open the application URL. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-01.png
  2. Screen "Screen 2" ‚Äî reached by: click "learn more" link. Design: docs/design/Screenshot_from_2026-07-13_12-14-19.png
Generate ONE Playwright flow that opens the start page, validates it against screen 1, then performs each navigation action and validates the resulting page against that screen's design. Deviations are defects. Do not pre-declare deviations before running.
Task: Test the homepage against the attached design.
output:
I'll start by reading the necessary files to bootstrap the `acme` project workspace.  Good. I have all I need. Now I'll analyze the two attached design images and produce the strategy artifacts.

---

**Design Analysis (from the attached images):**

**Screen 1 ‚Äî Home (`https://example.com/`)**
- Background: light grey (`~#eee` / `#f0f0f0`)
- Heading: `"Example Domain"` ‚Äî bold, dark charcoal, ~24px, left-aligned inside a centred content block
- Body paragraph: `"This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations."` ‚Äî body text, dark grey
- Link: `"Learn more"` ‚Äî blue underlined hyperlink, below the paragraph
- No header bar, no logo, no navigation menu, no footer visible

**Screen 2 ‚Äî IANA page (reached via "Learn more")**
- White background, grey header band
- IANA logo top-left + `"Internet Assigned Numbers Authority"` subtitle
- Top-nav: `Domains`, `Protocols`, `Numbers`, `About` ‚Äî right-aligned
- H1: `"Example Domains"` ‚Äî bold, dark
- Body paragraphs referencing RFC 2606, RFC 6761, example.com / example.org
- Section heading: `"Further Reading"`
- Bullet: `"IANA-managed Reserved Domains"` ‚Äî blue link
- Footer: multi-column links (`Domain Names`, `Number Resources`, `Protocols`, `About Us` + sub-links), IANA/ICANN attribution, `Privacy Policy`, `Terms of Service`
- `Last revised 2017-05-13.` line above footer

Now writing the strategy and memory files: The `actualtestcases.csv` write is the Test Planner's job ‚Äî blocked by the role boundary as expected. All my own-stage artifacts are written. Here is a summary of what was produced and the handoff.

---

## ‚úÖ Context Analyst ‚Äî Complete

### Files written
| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `projects/acme/specs/test-strategy.md` | Full strategy: env, auth, architecture, design source, business rules, TC catalogue |
| `projects/acme/specs/project-memory.md` | Verified facts: URL, selectors (pending runtime confirm), design tokens, gotchas |
| `projects/acme/specs/design-spec.md` | Design tokens extracted from both attached images |

---

### What was found (design analysis)

**Screen 1 ‚Äî Home (`https://example.com/`)** ‚Äî from attached image 1:
- `<h1>`: `Example Domain` (bold, dark charcoal)
- Paragraph: `This domain is for use in documentation examples without needing permission. Avoid use in operations.`
- Link: `Learn more` (blue, underlined)
- **No header, no nav, no logo, no footer** ‚Äî these absences are design constraints

**Screen 2 ‚Äî IANA "Example Domains"** ‚Äî from attached image 2:
- `<h1>`: `Example Domains`
- Top-nav: `Domains | Protocols | Numbers | About`
- Body references RFC 2606 and RFC 6761
- `Further Reading` section with `IANA-managed Reserved Domains` bullet link
- `Last revised 2017-05-13.` datestamp
- Footer: four section groups + `Privacy Policy` + `Terms of Service`

### Business Rules
BR-001 through BR-007 defined (see strategy ¬ß5).

### 16 Test Cases catalogued (TC-001 ‚Üí TC-016)
Covering Functional/E2E and UI Testing as requested. All expected values derived **exclusively from the design images** ‚Äî any live-app deviation is a defect.

---

### ‚è≠Ô∏è Handoff to Test Planner
The Test Planner should:
1. Read `specs/test-strategy.md` and `specs/design-spec.md`.
2. Populate `docs/actualtestcases.csv` from the TC catalogue in ¬ß6 of the strategy.
3. Produce `specs/master-test-plan.md` and `specs/selectors.md` via UI exploration of `https://example.com/`.
4. Note: **no auth helper needed** ‚Äî the app is public.
5. Key gotcha: the "Learn more" link may open a new tab ‚Äî the Test Planner must confirm this during UI exploration and flag for the Generator.
